column1: C[eskitek: how do I know when it's my turn? do I have to refresh?

C[pathogenix: That's why I like this site, it's not as popular as the big servers, but it's nice being able to play in real time or turn-based in the same game
C[pathogenix: I'm kinda nervous about this move
C[eskitek: Ha, well rest assured that I don't know what I'm doing.
pathogenix: :) that's okay. We'll play it through, look quickly at anything that was particularly interesting, and then you should play some of the other guys
pathogenix: Ian Pender just beat me with a four stone handicap. I'm hanging my head in shame
eskitek: OK back to work. THanks :)

pathogenix: I think this is the most sensible game I've had in the Huddle group so far :)

pathogenix: white has another move to make at B4
eskitek: Shhhh.... don't ruin the ending for me! Remind me to never take you to a movie.
pathogenix: sorry :D I find it useful to tell beginnes when the game is done  or they just keep playing wasted moves
C[pathogenix: white's group now has three eyes and can't be captured
eskitek: j6, 7h, and what's the 3rd one?
C[pathogenix: J8 and J9 are the third eye
C[pathogenix: hmmm... better to connect solidly
C[pathogenix: I think this game's done. Black's stones haven't room to live in the lower right
C[pathogenix: Once we both pass, we can check the score
eskitek: geez I just had a brief look at scoring
pathogenix: basically, we take the dead stones off the board and treat them as prisoners
column2: we each put the prisoners we've captured into our opponents' territory, and then count the remainder

column1: pathogenix: whoever has most territory wins
pathogenix: so every black stone I've captured would go in that upper right quadrant, and the white ones you've captured would go in the lower right
pathogenix: then count the territory that's left
pathogenix: and white gets some extra points called ""komi"" to make up for black's advantage in having the first move
eskitek: Why haven't you captured my guy at d4?
C[pathogenix: Because I passed - the game's finished
column2: I can capture D4 any time I like, and he can't do anything to me.. likewise the three stones at the bottom. They're considered dead.
